creator: m.butkus@tu-bs.de
text:
In message <20061017174024.2821816A49E@hub.freebsd.org> you write:

Hi,

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

I'm the author of the RBoot software as well as the port's maintainer.  
RBoot is an inactive project unlikely to be revived, due to lack of 
interest. The project's home page has been taken offline, too.

I therefore would like to drop maintainership of this port, 
and suggest the port to be deleted.

If the patch submitter wishes to take maintainership of this port, 
I have no objections. However, in that case I kindly request that 
it is noted in the port's documentation that this is unmaintained
software.

Kind regards,
	Martin Butkus
